properties.name: Feature: Steadfast5e - Expanded Skills
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Part of the Steadfast5e suite. Replaces the standard 18 5E skills with 26 flat skills that give every ability score a broader role and eliminate redundancy. Renames History/Academics, Medicine/Healing, Performance/Perform, Sleight of Hand/Trickery, Animal Handling/Beastcraft, and Nature/Wildcraft; moves Perception to CON; absorbs Intimidation into Deception; and adds 8 new skills. Old proficiencies migrate automatically. Compatible with the D&D 5E 2014 (Legacy) and 2024 versions.
